title: machine: QEMU: lock VM on stop/rm/set
body:
Lock the machine when stopping, removing or changing its attributes to make sure write accesses are serialized which should prevent a number of issues and inconsistencies reported.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

@ashley-cui @benoitf @rhatdan @n1hility PTAL

All QEMU commands with write access are now serialized.
